title: Doan wine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Doan wine''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage enjoyed by [[Bakuran]] [[Prime Minister (Bakura)|Prime Minister]] [[Molierre Cundertol]]. It was known to induce an effect known as "doan shock", which caused catatonia.<ref name="BFC2">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
